name: SomeIpSetProviderEndpoints
title: SomeIpSetProviderEndpoints
syntax: long SomeIpSetProviderEndpoints(dword csiHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Sets the UDP and TCP endpoint that is used for the consumed service instance to reach the corresponding provided service instance.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Consumed service instance handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetConsumedObjectHandle)
